## Description

A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Run `envsec ...`
2. ...
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g., Linux x86_64, macOS ARM64, Windows x86_64]
- envsec version: [e.g., 0.1.0] (run `envsec version`)
- Terminal: [e.g., bash, zsh, PowerShell]

## Additional Context

Any other context, screenshots, or error output.
